testcase.name: test_record_streak_action_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_148_travel_streak.py:142: in test_record_streak_action_endpoint assert record_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Record streak failed: {record_response.text}" E AssertionError: Record streak failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","action_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
